name: CAMBER ENERGY, INC.
summary: Camber Energy, Inc. is a growth-oriented diversified company with interests in innovative technologies and custom energy solutions. Its portfolio includes a majority interest in a patented medical and bio-hazard waste treatment system using ozone technology, patented electric transmission and distribution broken conductor protection systems, a licensed clean energy and carbon-capture system, and a 49% interest in Simson-Maxwell Ltd., which provides custom energy and power solutions to commercial and industrial clients in North America.

products.name: VKIN-300 Medical and Bio-Hazardous Waste Pre-Treatment Unit
products.description: Patented ozone-based system for treating medical and biohazard waste as a sustainable alternative to incineration, chemical, autoclave, and heat treatment.

products.name: Broken Conductor Protection System (Transmission)
products.description: Patented system to detect breaks in electric transmission lines and immediately terminate power before the line reaches the ground.

products.name: Broken Conductor Protection System (Distribution)
products.description: Patented system to detect breaks in electric distribution lines and immediately terminate power, improving grid safety and reliability.

products.name: ESG Clean Energy and Carbon-Capture System
products.description: Licensed stationary electric power generation system with heat and carbon dioxide capture capability, based on bottoming cycle power technology.

products.name: Custom Energy and Power Solutions (Simson-Maxwell)
products.description: Custom energy and power solutions provided to commercial and industrial clients in North America through 49%-owned Simson-Maxwell Ltd.

partnerships.description: Exclusive Intellectual Property License Agreement granting Viking rights to ESG's patents for stationary electric power generation and carbon dioxide capture.

partnerships.partner_name: Laboratoire national de métrologie et d'essais (LNE)
partnerships.description: French standards body conducting acceptance review and certification process for the VKIN-300 unit under French Standard NFX 30-503.
